name: biz-review
description: Review the business case (breadth then depth) and fix findings until no Blocker or Major remains.
rubric: The breadth pass scanned the current draft for missing sections, orphan figures, and unsupported claims.
The depth pass returned an explicit verdict for each of the five gates (Baseline Integrity, Impact Reconciliation, Claim Substantiation, Change Feasibility & Risk, ROI / Mandate Fit).
Zero Blocker findings remain (e.g., an unsourced baseline, an impact figure that does not reconcile, a missing risk).
Zero Major findings remain (e.g., an improvement claim asserted without evidence).
The final recommendation's payback is consistent with the stated mandate.
fixPrompt: Each iteration: (1) breadth-review the current case for completeness and internal consistency; (2) depth-review by issuing a verdict on each gate in gates.md; (3) if no Blocker/Major findings remain and biz-validate is green, converge — report Minor/Nit findings without iterating; (4) otherwise fix the Blocker/Major findings in the case and re-run biz-validate before the next pass.
guardrails: Findings are fixed in the case, not argued away — a gate failure means the analysis changes, not the verdict text.
Do not soften a risk or drop a baseline source to clear a gate.
Re-review the fixes themselves each iteration, not just the prior findings list.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the remaining Blocker/Major findings, the fix attempted for each, and recommend human reviewer review or a return to the Diagnose stage.
